query: MongoDB Atlas operational complexity managed service 2024
answer: MongoDB Atlas offers managed services that simplify operational complexity, enhance cost optimization, and ensure high performance and availability for business-critical applications. Features include independent shard scaling and auto-scaling. These tools help manage resources efficiently.

results.title: MongoDB Atlas Operational Efficiency
results.snippet: MongoDB Atlas takes care of time-consuming and costly administration tasks so you can get the database resources you need, when you need them.

results.title: MongoDB Atlas Introduces Enhanced Cost Optimization Tools | MongoDB
results.snippet: At the recent MongoDB.local London, MongoDB announced several new MongoDB Atlas features that improve elasticity and help optimize costs while maintaining the performance and availability that business-critical applications demand. With MongoDB Atlas, customers can manage flexible provisioning, zero-downtime scaling, and easy auto-scaling of their clusters. From October 2024, all Atlas customers with dedicated tier clusters can employ these recently announced enhancements for improved cost optimization. **Independent shard scaling** enables customers running MongoDB Atlas to do this in a cost-optimal manner. With these updates, customers have greater flexibility and granularity in provisioning and scaling resources across their Atlas clusters on all three major cloud providers. Take a look at how Coinbase is optimizing for both availability and cost in the volatile world of cryptocurrency with MongoDB Atlas’ help, or read our auto-scaling docs page to learn more. As businesses focus more on optimizing cloud infrastructure costs, the latest MongoDB Atlas enhancements— independent shard scaling, more responsive auto-scaling, and extended storage with IOPS—empower organizations to manage resources efficiently while maintaining top performance.
